title: Build a nightly observe-and-diagnose cycle
goal: Run a bounded nightly cycle that observes repository and runtime health, quick validation, RepoGround freshness, task supply, recurring friction and the source-bound Grabowski audit projection, then produces a deduplicated morning digest without mutating repositories or creating tasks automatically.

approval.note: This task implements the cycle in repositories. The resulting production cycle is constrained to read-only observation and requires a separate plan for later effects.

acceptance.assertion: The cycle uses an explicit repository and service allowlist, resource budgets, per-probe timeouts and a global runtime ceiling.

The digest covers source commit and dirty state, quick validation receipt, open PR and CI state where available, RepoGround freshness, failed services or tasks, recovery-gate state, ready-task supply, recurring friction classifications, execution-governor evidence and fixed-window audit-projection findings.

The cycle consumes grabowski_audit_projection only as a derived read-only trend source and still reads current runtime health, task state, live leases, friction closeouts and execution-governor outcomes from their authoritative surfaces; projection candidates remain proposal-only.
The first production version performs no pull, checkout, patch, push, merge, deploy, cleanup, service restart, queue mutation or automatic task creation.
Every finding carries source identity, timestamp, freshness, confidence and the relevant source or findings SHA-256; unknown or unavailable probes remain explicit instead of becoming green.

Unchanged audit and diagnostic findings are deduplicated by findings SHA-256; the snapshot SHA-256 remains the exact provenance identity, severity and recurrence thresholds are defined, and the morning digest remains bounded and operator-readable.
One failed repository or connector probe cannot abort the complete cycle; failures are isolated, recorded and retried only under the bounded transport policy.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The nightly cycle requires bounded observation code, scheduled execution, diagnostic state and its no-mutation contract.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks
